deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. Closed May 1 2026. Template development for property analysis tool.
deals.next: Feed data to Sirhc for analysis sheet template

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as template basis for property analysis tool development.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage deal. Isaac Linares development interest (~$150K offer for mobile home project with veteran units). Title defect (incomplete legal description). Signs picked up. No path forward.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Walking away from deal. Signs retrieved from property. No path forward with sisters or Isaac development concept.
Price adjustment conversation needed. Follow up with prior buyers. Isaac development angle expanded to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer Ball initiated title work. Deed #20100079485 has incomplete legal description. Van Hutchins (attorney) preparing Correction Deed. ENV Title to review.
Updated sisters on Apr 20 showing. Isaac discussed mobile home development offer (~$150K). Sisters enthusiastic about development angle.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: VA loan $489K+ payoff. Market value $350K-$400K. Underwater $93K-$143K. Vacant 6 months. Double-carrying (mortgage + Pearl Brewery apartment). Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash. Sellers chose to move back in and delay listing.
deals.next: Closed - mutual termination May 29. Plan to relist after repairs when market improves.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back into property. Plan to make updates/repairs, relist when ready. Termination release sent for signatures.
Call completed. Chandler laid off (hardship docs on file). Ruled out Airbnb and rental (won over $2.2K/mo). Leaning toward short sale. Still confident in Chris. Short sale client email drafted.
Market analysis sent. Carrying cost $5.3K-$6K+/mo. Comp 717 Jack Nicklaus at $519K. Three options presented. Commission lever offered (3% to 2% = $5.2K savings).
Buyer showing scheduled. Lawn care quotes obtained. Express Offers returned $550K (likely inflated). Showing Monday May 4 at 2pm.
Gilberto buyers sound wishy-washy. Price adjustment conversation needed. Potential short sale situation. Broker guidance needed on Devine listing.

deals.title: Howell - New Construction Search
deals.notes: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction (no HOA). Pre-approval ~$122K with Zach Schaphorst. Out of 301 W Saxet wholesale deal (Corpus, $85K, FHA 203k). Still searching for options.
deals.next: Continue new construction search. Monitor for builder options.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching. Isaac and Josh (LT) updated.
Isaac brought wholesale deal at 301 W Saxet, Corpus Christi at $85K. Two structures (one livable, one 2BR teardown). FHA 203k angle. Connected Mike/Alice with Isaac directly.
Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy. New construction search platform for browsing. Keep momentum while pre-approval sorts out.
Text from Mike - rental being sold. 916 Marriott assessed (foundation issues, 2011 roof). Pivoting to new construction. Introduced idea - they open to it.

deals.title: Colton & Abigail Brown
deals.notes: 4.05 acres, 3BR/2BA. Payoff ~$257K. Thin market (3 comps in 10 miles). Recommended list $295K (net ~$14.7K to sellers). Colton possible contractor work at 181 CR 7751. Divorce situation, need to move.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Confirm acreage and renovation status. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property ~10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 17 (now ~$257K). CMA pulled - thin market, 3 comps. Built presentation with net sheet.
Prior clients - Chris helped with original VA renovation loan. Divorce - need to finish renovation and sell. Colton looking for contractor work.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft, 2011 build, Laura Heights PUD. Listed $259.9K May 14. Potential hairline foundation crack. Roof claim moving forward. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. June deadline for sellers (moving to NC).
deals.next: Confirm showing time May 30. Follow up with second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offer.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back - favorite property. Love floorplan and condition. Walk-in closet slightly small flagged. Pre-inspection report offered. May 30 showing rescheduled, time TBD.
Texted Jose/Katy about investor cash offer $176.3K. Kept conversation open. 4th showing May 23 at 1:30pm.
MLS live. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing received - cultural concern about street direction. Sent preinspection report and notes to showing agent.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG (43 photos + floorplans). Going live May 13.
Listing consultation on-site 11am. Isaac present. Meeting went well. Foundation crack discussed. Payoff discrepancy flagged ($170K vs $192K).

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction, $152K. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature at mobile notary. Cleared and funded Apr 26. Officially closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Post-close tasks: Joy gift basket + rug + trolley delivery. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Thank thank Michael (notary) and UPS Store staff.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Transaction confirmed complete. Post-close tasks still pending (gifts, thank you notes).
Cleared and funded.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Delivered to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title. Joy signed at UPS Store. Thank you basket planned for Michael and UPS Store staff.
Called Reliable Title - confirmed lien was prepared at Deeds.com. Chicago Title underwriting confirmed release required or 45-day wait.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.contact: Priority Bank FSB (Kelly, Jerry Sadler, Ray Stidham)
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO property. Damage post-possession (bank liable). HouzzPro/Matt Toney doing cleanup ($54.8K estimate). Floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utilities: Medina Electric and EMCSUD need final confirmation. Police report stalled. Listing agreement not yet submitted.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD for utility status. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to bank. Update Kelly/Jerry/Ray on progress.

logs.m: Visited property - drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Kelly got mileage approved - ACH payment processing. Police reports still stalled.
Cleanup active - floor demo complete, drywall cut for electrician/plumber. New drywall on site. Utilities confirmed: Medina Electric + EMCSUD. Email sent to Kelly offering utility lead.
On-site visit - met Bryce (dumpster contractor). Work active and moving. Bryce has wife (active military, VA buyer lead).
Met Matt Toney (HouzzPro) in office. Connected Matt directly with Jerry Sadler on call. Work starting next Monday.
Two estimates received: HouzzPro ($54.877K) vs T&T ($61.98K). Jerry recommended HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as decision-maker.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113K. Buyer agent Javier. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier for price update. Chicago Title escrow opened with Alyssa Castillo.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email (tmail.com or gmail.com).

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza - buyer agent Javier. TXR 1903 sent to Javier for price update. Connected Steve with Chicago Title for mortgage/payoff. EMD not yet received. Another agent told to submit backup offer.
Steve signed amendment - MLS updated to $117.5K. Exclusions locked (Conex contents, camper, feeders). Agent and buyer outreach ongoing.
Steve sent new photos - green screen content opportunity. New prospect interested in showing. Strategy confirmed: land-only, cash, buyer decides after close.
Clearing complete - Steve finished and sent photos. Posting to social. Drone footage prioritized. First offer (Michael Rodriguez/RBFCU) confirmed dead - no earnest money.

deals.title: Moran - New Construction
deals.notes: Brandon mother. Budget $50K down, target ~$1K/month payment. Not locked to any builder. Buyer rep signed May 7. Jimbo rental (Green Bliss) contact backed out May 28. $500 sent. Skyslope needs clearing.
deals.next: Follow up on buyer interest and timeline. Continue builder outreach. Clear Skyslope listing.

logs.m: Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. $500 sent. Skyslope listing to be cleared. Buyer search continues independently.
Follow up with Milagros needed. Ask Brandon status. MI Homes option from Frank still in play.
Buyer rep signed May 7. MI Homes option found that keeps payments under $1.2K/mo. Multiple builder options working.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Rental listing. Never executed listing agreement. Ended on good terms. Payment received by Chris for time invested.

logs.m: Release sent with acknowledgment that payment received. Relationship intact - closed clean.
Jimbo backed out. Chris sent $500 to cover time and money invested.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing to plants story. Content collaboration potential (with permission). Trust-based, long-term real estate opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up - check in personally. Ask permission to share story for content.

logs.m: Community connection through garden share group. Potential content collaboration (healing through gardens). Real estate potential through trust.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Investor with active deal flow. Buy box and strategy unknown. Area of interest likely Schertz based on initial context. Met in person with potential for regular deal collaboration.
leads.next: Full intake call - understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold). Add to Bold Trail. Connect on active deals.

logs.m: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. Full intake pending.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Property at 13810 Tangle Tree St. ~90% complete. Already working with realtor. Open to selling as-is or finishing. Opportunity for pre-market buyer connection. Relationship-first, no pressure approach.
leads.next: Follow up - check in on finishing progress. Offer to promote listing to network. Stay connected through garden community.

logs.m: Met at garden event. Has property near completion at 13810 Tangle Tree St. Currently with another realtor. Open to as-is sale or finishing.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Son inherited home. Deceased owner was avid gardener (plants on fence). Miss Pat (neighbor) made introduction. Property disposition unknown - may keep, rent, or sell. Sensitive timing - lead with empathy.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out - introduce as neighbor/gardener first. Assess situation.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor directly behind her may have passed away. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener. No contact yet.

leads.title: Bryce - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Dumpster contractor at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. Strong buying power, prime buyer profile.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info (phone/email) - on site regularly. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife active military (VA eligible). Recently moved from Ohio, renting, looking to buy in SA.

leads.title: Jerome - Buyer Fixer Lead
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner (downline agent, Schertz/Cibolo) has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation - details pending. Caught up May 11, full details needed.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full buyer and property details. Understand financing and work scope. Match inventory if possible.

logs.m: Jerome Gardner reached out - has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation. Details pending.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped Brandon start in real estate. Brandon's mom (Milagros Stringer) is new construction buyer (~$50K down, $1K/month target). Brandon uncle (Jimbo) had rental (Green Bliss, now closed). Brandon position as investment-side partner developing.
leads.next: PM company options to Brandon. Confirm rental price/terms with Jimbo (if still relevant). Monitor Milagros buyer journey. Develop long-term investor relationship.

logs.m: Multiple opportunities active: Green Bliss rental setup, Milagros new construction buyer, Brandon as potential long-term investor. Keeping all warm.

leads.title: Kurt - Neighbor/Prospect
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Interested in nearby listing intel (under contract at $275K). Possible seller or buyer lead - needs qualification.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Follow up on listing timeline. Determine if seller, buyer, or curious neighbor. Report back on market activity.

logs.m: Spoke with Chris about nearby listing at 9815 Conbes. Under contract at $275K. Wants intel on offers/deal. Priority follow-up needed.

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 Utilities & Listing
priorities.notes: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) and EMCSUD (830-709-3879) to confirm utility setup status. Replace camera batteries on-site. Submit listing agreement to bank (Jerry Sadler & Ray Stidham). Update Kelly/Jerry/Ray on current progress with photos.

Call EMCSUD - confirm water service setup
Replace camera batteries at property

priorities.notes: Second-look buyers returned as favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Showing rescheduled to May 30 - confirm time. Follow up with buyer agent after showing for movement indication. Monitor for backup offer submission.

followUps.text: Confirm tomorrow showing time (May 30)
Follow up with second-look buyer agent post-showing
Monitor for backup offer from other agent
Send June deadline update to Jose/Katy if no offer by June 1

priorities.notes: Under contract at $113K with Espinoza buyers. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier for price update. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email (tmail.com vs gmail.com). Monitor for earnest money and signed docs.

Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier
Verify Mrs. Espinoza email correct domain

priorities.title: Colton Brown Listing - Prep Phase
priorities.notes: Divorce situation, need to sell. Payoff ~$257K, recommend list $295K for ~$14.7K net to sellers. Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage and renovation completion status. Get listing agreement signed. Professional photos and MLS launch.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender
Confirm acreage and renovation status on-site
Get listing agreement signed by both
Schedule professional photography
Launch MLS listing

priorities.title: Milagros Stringer New Construction
priorities.notes: Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target ~$1K/month payment. Builder rate buydowns are key angle (can shift $100K+ in purchasing power). Not locked to any builder. Need to coordinate builder visits and register Chris as agent on first visit. Follow up on buyer timeline and interest level.

followUps.text: Confirm Milagros buyer rep still signed and active
Coordinate builder visits with Brandon and Milagros
Register as agent on first builder visit (critical)
Monitor builder rate buydown options (1.9-5.6%)
Follow up on timeline and urgency
